001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.models;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
004import java.util.Arrays;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ActiveAamBitsRequest;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.AlarmStatusRequest;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.AlertStatusRequest;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.CGMAlertStatusRequest;
010import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.HighestAamRequest;
011import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.MalfunctionStatusRequest;
012import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.ActiveAamBitsResponse;
013import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.AlarmStatusResponse;
014import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.AlertStatusResponse;
015import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.CGMAlertStatusResponse;
016import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.HighestAamResponse;
017import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse;
018import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.ReminderStatusResponse;
019import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.shared.JavaHelpers;
020
021import java.time.Instant;
022import java.util.ArrayList;
023import java.util.HashMap;
024import java.util.HashSet;
025import java.util.List;
026import java.util.Map;
027import java.util.stream.Collectors;
028
029/**
030 * Bundle of notification related responses for easier processing
031 */
032public class NotificationBundle {
033    private ApiVersion apiVersion;
034    private AlertStatusResponse alertStatusResponse;
035    private ReminderStatusResponse reminderStatusResponse;
036    private AlarmStatusResponse alarmStatusResponse;
037    private CGMAlertStatusResponse cgmAlertStatusResponse;
038    private MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse malfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse;
039    private Map<ActiveAamBitsResponse.AamType, ActiveAamBitsResponse> activeAamBitsResponses = new HashMap<>();
040    private HighestAamResponse highestAamResponse;
041
042    private Map<Class<? extends Message>, Instant> lastUpdatedTimes = new HashMap<>();
043
044    public static List<Message> allRequests() {
045        return allRequests(null);
046    }
047
048    public List<Message> allRequestsForPump() {
049        return allRequests(apiVersion);
050    }
051
052    public static List<Message> allRequests(ApiVersion apiVersion) {
053        List<Message> requests = Arrays.asList(
054                new AlertStatusRequest(),
055                new AlarmStatusRequest(),
056                new CGMAlertStatusRequest(),
057                new MalfunctionStatusRequest(),
058                new HighestAamRequest(),
059                new ActiveAamBitsRequest(new byte[]{2}),
060                new ActiveAamBitsRequest(new byte[]{4})
061        );
062
063        if (apiVersion == null) {
064            return requests;
065        }
066
067        return requests.stream()
068                .filter(request -> supportsApiVersion(request, apiVersion))
069                .collect(Collectors.toList());
070    }
071
072    private static boolean supportsApiVersion(Message message, ApiVersion apiVersion) {
073        ApiVersion minApi = message.props().minApi().get();
074        return apiVersion.greaterThan(minApi) ||
075                (apiVersion.getMajor() == minApi.getMajor() && apiVersion.getMinor() == minApi.getMinor());
076    }
077
078    public static List<Class<? extends Message>> responseClasses() {
079        return Arrays.asList(
080                AlertStatusResponse.class,
081                ReminderStatusResponse.class,
082                AlarmStatusResponse.class,
083                CGMAlertStatusResponse.class,
084                MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse.class,
085                HighestAamResponse.class,
086                ActiveAamBitsResponse.class
087        );
088    }
089
090    public static boolean isNotificationResponse(Message message) {
091        for (Class<? extends Message> m : responseClasses()) {
092            if (m.isInstance(message)) return true;
093        }
094
095        return false;
096    }
097
098    public NotificationBundle() {
099    }
100
101    public NotificationBundle(ApiVersion apiVersion) {
102        this.apiVersion = apiVersion;
103    }
104
105    public NotificationBundle(NotificationBundle bundle) {
106        this.apiVersion = bundle.apiVersion;
107        this.alertStatusResponse = bundle.alertStatusResponse;
108        this.reminderStatusResponse = bundle.reminderStatusResponse;
109        this.alarmStatusResponse = bundle.alarmStatusResponse;
110        this.cgmAlertStatusResponse = bundle.cgmAlertStatusResponse;
111        this.malfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse = bundle.malfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse;
112        this.activeAamBitsResponses = new HashMap<>(bundle.activeAamBitsResponses);
113        this.highestAamResponse = bundle.highestAamResponse;
114        this.lastUpdatedTimes = bundle.lastUpdatedTimes;
115    }
116
117    public void setApiVersion(ApiVersion apiVersion) {
118        this.apiVersion = apiVersion;
119    }
120
121    public ApiVersion getApiVersion() {
122        return apiVersion;
123    }
124
125    public NotificationBundle add(Message message) {
126        if (!isNotificationResponse(message)) return this;
127
128        if (message instanceof AlertStatusResponse) {
129            alertStatusResponse = (AlertStatusResponse) message;
130            lastUpdatedTimes.put(AlertStatusResponse.class, Instant.now());
131        } else if (message instanceof ReminderStatusResponse) {
132            reminderStatusResponse = (ReminderStatusResponse) message;
133            lastUpdatedTimes.put(ReminderStatusResponse.class, Instant.now());
134        } else if (message instanceof AlarmStatusResponse) {
135            alarmStatusResponse = (AlarmStatusResponse) message;
136            lastUpdatedTimes.put(AlarmStatusResponse.class, Instant.now());
137        } else if (message instanceof CGMAlertStatusResponse) {
138            cgmAlertStatusResponse = (CGMAlertStatusResponse) message;
139            lastUpdatedTimes.put(CGMAlertStatusResponse.class, Instant.now());
140        } else if (message instanceof MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse) {
141            malfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse = (MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse) message;
142            lastUpdatedTimes.put(MalfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse.class, Instant.now());
143        } else if (message instanceof ActiveAamBitsResponse) {
144            ActiveAamBitsResponse activeAamBitsResponse = (ActiveAamBitsResponse) message;
145            activeAamBitsResponses.put(activeAamBitsResponse.getAamType(), activeAamBitsResponse);
146            lastUpdatedTimes.put(ActiveAamBitsResponse.class, Instant.now());
147        } else if (message instanceof HighestAamResponse) {
148            highestAamResponse = (HighestAamResponse) message;
149            lastUpdatedTimes.put(HighestAamResponse.class, Instant.now());
150        }
151
152        return this;
153    }
154
155    /**
156     * @return list of raw alert/alarm enums or string errors. Union type of {@link NotificationEnum}:
157     * <ul>
158     *     <li>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.AlertStatusResponse.AlertResponseType}</li>
159     *     <li>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.AlarmStatusResponse.AlarmResponseType}</li>
160     *     <li>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.ReminderStatusResponse.ReminderType}</li>
161     *     <li>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus.CGMAlertStatusResponse.CGMAlert}</li>
162     *     <li>{@link HighestAamResponse}</li>
163     * </ul>
164     */
165    public List<NotificationEnum> get() {
166        ArrayList<NotificationMessage> notificationMessages = new ArrayList<>();
167        ArrayList<NotificationEnum> slugs = new ArrayList<>();
168
169        if (alertStatusResponse != null) {
170            notificationMessages.add(alertStatusResponse);
171            alertStatusResponse.getAlerts().stream().sorted().forEach(slugs::add);
172        }
173        if (alarmStatusResponse != null) {
174            notificationMessages.add(alarmStatusResponse);
175            alarmStatusResponse.getAlarms().stream().sorted().forEach(slugs::add);
176        }
177        if (reminderStatusResponse != null) {
178            notificationMessages.add(reminderStatusResponse);
179            reminderStatusResponse.getReminders().stream().sorted().forEach(slugs::add);
180        }
181        if (cgmAlertStatusResponse != null) {
182            notificationMessages.add(cgmAlertStatusResponse);
183            cgmAlertStatusResponse.getCgmAlerts().stream().sorted().forEach(slugs::add);
184        }
185        if (highestAamResponse != null) {
186            ActiveAamBitsResponse activeMalfunctionBits =
187                activeAamBitsResponses.get(ActiveAamBitsResponse.AamType.MALFUNCTION);
188            if (highestAamResponse.hasMalfunction(notificationMessages.toArray(new NotificationMessage[0])) &&
189                highestAamResponse.matchesActiveMalfunction(activeMalfunctionBits, malfunctionBitmaskStatusResponse) &&
190                !StringUtils.isBlank(highestAamResponse.getErrorString()))
191            {
192                slugs.add(highestAamResponse);
193            }
194        }
195        // todo remaining once understood
196
197        return slugs;
198    }
199
200    public Map<Class<? extends Message>, Instant> getLastUpdatedTimes() {
201        return lastUpdatedTimes;
202    }
203
204    public boolean isEmpty() {
205        return getNotificationCount()==0;
206    }
207
208    public int getNotificationCount() {
209        return get().size();
210    }
211
212
213
214    public String toString() {
215        return JavaHelpers.autoToString(this, new HashSet<>(Arrays.asList("lastUpdatedTimes")));
216    }
217}
